body:
## Wave 2 — Revenue Engine v2

### What changed

| File | Content |
|------|---------|
| `company/revenue_engine/revenue_engine_v2.py` | Main engine — reads lead data, generates 8 output files, fallback targets if no data |
| `company/revenue_engine/REVENUE_ENGINE_V2.md` | Operating manual |
| `company/brand/DEALIX_BRAND_SYSTEM_V2.md` | Brand voice, messaging matrix per offer rung |
| `company/site/WEBSITE_CONVERSION_MAP_V2.md` | Page/CTA map, hero copy matrix by sector |
| `company/sales/REVENUE_PLAYBOOK_V2.md` | Daily sales cycle, qualification, CRM states |
| `company/finance/COMMERCIAL_RULES_V2.md` | Pricing authority, invoice rules, cost controls |
| `scripts/dealix_revenue_day.sh` | Runner script |
| `.github/workflows/revenue_day.yml` | Manual + weekday scheduled dry-run |

### Engine Outputs (all in company/runtime/revenue/YYYY-MM-DD/ — gitignored)

```
DAILY_OFFER.md       — offer of the day + sector focus
TOP20_TARGETS.csv    — top 20 scored outbound targets
WHATSAPP_DRAFTS.md   — personalized WA drafts for top 10
EMAIL_DRAFTS.md      — email drafts for top 10
LINKEDIN_POST.md     — one Arabic LinkedIn post
PROPOSAL_STUBS.md    — proposal summaries for top 5
WEBSITE_BRIEF.md     — suggested website update for today
CEO_REVENUE_REPORT.md — full daily pack summary
```

### Validation output

```
Python 3.11.15
bash syntax: OK
OK Revenue pack: company/runtime/revenue/2026-06-10/
OK Targets: 19
  CEO_REVENUE_REPORT.md
  DAILY_OFFER.md
  EMAIL_DRAFTS.md
  LINKEDIN_POST.md
  PROPOSAL_STUBS.md
  TOP20_TARGETS.csv
  WEBSITE_BRIEF.md
  WHATSAPP_DRAFTS.md
=== VALIDATION PASS ===
```

### What was NOT done (intentional)
- No Docker, no npm, no auto-send
- No generated files committed
- No external API calls

### Next step after merge
Wave 3: `feat/intake-presentation-os` — Client intake + presentation engine.
Do NOT start Wave 3 before this PR is merged to main.

> Note: This PR was built on `main`. Merge PR #709 (Wave 1) first for full context chain.

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_013o5KPdEBiqfZBRLbePom3Z)_

commits.messageBody:
Wave 2 — Revenue Engine. Adds a complete daily commercial pack generator
that produces 8 output files (offer, targets, WhatsApp drafts, email drafts,
LinkedIn post, proposal stubs, website brief, CEO report) from existing lead
data. Nothing is sent automatically — all output is draft for founder review.

Files added:
- company/revenue_engine/revenue_engine_v2.py: main engine (fallback-safe)
- company/revenue_engine/REVENUE_ENGINE_V2.md: operating manual
- company/brand/DEALIX_BRAND_SYSTEM_V2.md: brand voice and messaging
- company/site/WEBSITE_CONVERSION_MAP_V2.md: updated page/CTA map
- company/sales/REVENUE_PLAYBOOK_V2.md: daily sales cycle and CRM states
- company/finance/COMMERCIAL_RULES_V2.md: pricing authority and invoice rules
- scripts/dealix_revenue_day.sh: daily runner script
- .github/workflows/revenue_day.yml: manual + scheduled CI dry-run

Validation: python 3.11 OK, bash -n OK, engine ran — 19 targets, 8 files OK

https://claude.ai/code/session_013o5KPdEBiqfZBRLbePom3Z
commits.messageHeadline: feat(wave-2): Revenue Engine v2 — daily commercial pack generation
